compositional_proof.arithmetic_claim: The real generated single-cluster RTL is simulated independently for each of eight distinct query heads against the perf/reference math, while every run uses identical key and value tensors.
compositional_proof.composition_claim: Because the wrapper only broadcasts shared keys and shared value responses to arithmetic-equivalent children and serializes their unchanged results in the tested order, the two checks compose to the GQA8 claim.
compositional_proof.scope_limit: This is a compositional proof; it does not claim that a flat eight-cluster RTL simulation was run.
compositional_proof.wrapper_claim: The focused wrapper protocol test verifies atomic shared-key broadcast, one shared external value replay, and deterministic head-major then slice-major result order.
